description: Explanatory-journalism register (Vox-inspired): bold sans headlines on a warm light field, crisp legible type, annotations/cutouts/maps as evidence, subtle print texture on collage elements only.

visual.transition_bias: hard cuts on evidence beats; a dissolve only when the argument breathes

format.hook_rule: open on the concrete paradox or artifact, then the question it forces; plant one detail the ending pays off
recurring: cutout-collage introduces each NAMED object/person as desk evidence
stats lock with a physical thud (graphical foley)
